summary.key_theme: 儘管面臨地緣政治風險與短期技術故障，Amazon 憑藉強勁的 AI 成長敘事與機構投資人的持續加碼，維持長期成長動能。

bullish.title: Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller Sells Sandisk Stock and Buys an AI Stock Up 223,000% Since Its IPO — Stanley Druckenmiller sold a soaring semiconductor stock and bought Amazon in the fourth quarter.
bullish.reason: 知名投資人 Stanley Druckenmiller 在第四季買入 Amazon，顯示頂級機構對其 AI 轉型與長期價值的信心。

bullish.title: Amazon Expands AI Footprint With $427 Million George Washington University Campus Acquisition As Data Center Arms Race Intensifies
bullish.reason: 斥資 4.27 億美元收購校園用地，顯示 Amazon 積極擴張資料中心基礎設施，以應對 AI 運算需求的軍備競賽。

bullish.title: Cathie Wood Buys What This Billionaire Is Selling: Ark Adds Amazon And Alibaba Stock
bullish.reason: Cathie Wood 旗下的 Ark Invest 加碼買進 Amazon，進一步強化了市場對其作為 AI 成長股的認同。

bullish.title: What Makes Amazon (AMZN) an Overall High-Quality Growth Compounder?
bullish.reason: Jensen Investment Management 的報告肯定了 Amazon 作為高品質成長複合股的地位，有助於穩定長期投資人信心。

bullish.title: Meet the Artificial Intelligence (AI) ETF With 20% of Its Portfolio Parked in Alphabet, Nvidia, Micron, and Amazon
bullish.reason: Amazon 被納入主流 AI ETF 的核心持股，反映其在 AI 產業鏈中的關鍵地位。

bullish.title: Is Amazon Stock a Long-Term Buy? — This is historically one of the best companies that investors could have owned.
bullish.reason: 市場分析師持續看好 Amazon 的長期投資價值，認為其歷史表現優異。

bullish.title: How Amazon and Google are taking on smart homes with AI
bullish.reason: 透過 AI 技術升級智慧家庭產品，有助於提升 Amazon 生態系統的用戶黏著度。

bullish.title: Subscription burnout has made Gen Z fall in love with all things physical.
bullish.reason: Z 世代對實體商品的偏好回升，對 Amazon 的電商業務具有潛在的正面影響。

bearish.title: Amazon Faces Data Center Strikes As OpenAI AI Deal Reshapes Growth Narrative — AWS data centers in the UAE and Bahrain were hit by drone strikes
bearish.reason: 中東資料中心遭無人機襲擊造成結構性損壞與服務中斷，直接威脅 AWS 的基礎設施安全與營運穩定性。

bearish.title: Amazon says hours-long outage was triggered by 'software code deployment'
bearish.reason: 軟體部署錯誤導致長時間的系統當機，影響結帳與帳戶功能，對用戶體驗與品牌信譽造成短期負面衝擊。

bearish.title: Amazon Eliminates 100 White Collar Jobs In Robotics Team: Report
bearish.reason: 機器人部門裁員 100 人，顯示公司在特定部門進行成本控管與組織調整。

bearish.title: Forget Amazon, If Oil Hits $100, Walmart Is the Only Retailer Built to Thrive the Squeeze
bearish.reason: 分析師指出若油價飆升，Walmart 的營運模式可能比 Amazon 更具抗通膨韌性。

bearish.title: Amazon Website and App Hit by Shopping Errors as User Reports Spike
bearish.reason: 與當機事件相關的用戶報告，進一步證實了系統穩定性問題對銷售流程的干擾。

neutral.title: Amazon says Anthropic’s Claude still OK for AWS customers to use outside defense work
neutral.reason: 針對五角大廈對 Anthropic 的風險標籤，Amazon 澄清商業客戶仍可使用，屬於合規性說明，影響中性。

neutral.title: The $200 Billion Question: Is Amazon Finally Ready to Pay a Dividend?
neutral.reason: 探討是否發放股利，屬於市場對資本配置的長期討論，目前無具體決策。

neutral.title: Investors Heavily Search Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN): Here is What You Need to Know
neutral.reason: 僅為投資人搜尋熱度分析，未提供新的基本面資訊。

neutral.title: You can buy gold on Amazon — but should you?
neutral.reason: 關於在 Amazon 購買黃金的消費建議，對公司營收影響微乎其微。
